name: Local PyMuPDF4LLM Extractor
description: Explicit offline PDF-to-Markdown extraction through Paper Search's pinned local PyMuPDF4LLM runtime.
author: Paper Search CLI X

ocr.label: OCR
ocr.description: Request OCR. The initial pinned runtime returns OCR_UNAVAILABLE because it does not install an OCR engine.

timeoutMs.label: Timeout (ms)
timeoutMs.description: Local parser deadline from 1000 through 600000 milliseconds.
